title: We Spent Diwali At Disney | #shorts
full_text: What was it about this festival bridge that made you feel like Indian people were cool? >> The first of all the dancing. I mean we could have dance groups of like extremely long numbers. So certain groups or classes were doing five different dance routines changing. I watched them change in 1 second get back on stage and then include um people who are mentally divergent in their performances as well which is extremely impressive cuz it shows that not only are you supporting the brown community but you're supporting the mentally divergent community as well. >> And Mickey and Minnie wore Indian costumes. >> Yeah, that was cool. I don't know if they've worn costumes from Japan or China or other nations of the world. >> I like that you compared us. But the point is, >> yeah, somehow we always get compared to all the other Asian nations. >> Do you have any focused right now? You just gave this whole rant about how standing on business and you're waving around. >> Yeah, it's kind of scaring me a little bit. Just put it down. I like as if you were not scary enough already.
